title: How does an LLM "know" the sky is blue?
description: An exploration into how large language models predict text and whether they truly "know" the facts they output.

title: Encrypt Once, Boot Forever: TPM2 Auto-Unlock on Fedora 44
description: How to seal your LUKS decryption key inside the TPM chip to let the hardware unlock your drive automatically on boot.

title: The Bayesian Trap: A Mathematical Case for Trying Something New
description: How Bayes' theorem exposes a cognitive trap — why your brain fights novelty, and why the math says you should push through it anyway.

title: The Context Theory of Relationships
description: A framework for understanding why relationships shift when context shifts — and what that means for how we build and maintain them.

title: You Don't Need Prompt Engineering to Talk to AI
description: The prompt engineering discourse is overblown. Here's why thinking clearly matters more than any framework or formula.

title: Bias Buster — CTF Writeup
description: A writeup on designing Bias Buster — a CTF-style challenge exploring AI/ML data bias, built for the AI/ML Club at NFSU.
